name: Cashland Financial Services
description_short: Cashland Financial Services offers payday loans up to $2,500 in Las Vegas with quick online applications and same-day funding availability.
description_long:
Cashland Financial Services operates as a payday loan provider based in Las Vegas, Nevada, serving customers seeking emergency short-term financing. The company maintains a physical storefront at 901 N Rancho Dr, Suite B, Las Vegas, NV 89106, and operates extended hours including weekends to accommodate working customers. Their business model focuses on fast cash access for individuals facing immediate financial needs between paychecks.

The company offers payday loans ranging from $100 to $2,500 through both in-person visits and an online application process. They advertise a simple online form for fast access to funds with claims of quick approval and funding timelines. Their loan amounts are structured in increments from $100 up to $1,000, with options for higher amounts up to $2,500. The platform emphasizes data security, stating that personal information is handled safely during the application process.

Cashland distinguishes itself through extended operating hours (9AM-7PM weekdays and Saturday, 10AM-5PM Sunday) and availability of both online and in-person lending options. Customer testimonials indicate long-term relationships, with at least one customer reporting five years of repeat business. The company maintains a physical presence unlike purely online lenders, allowing for face-to-face transactions and immediate cash disbursement.

The company holds a 3.4-star rating across 17 reviews, indicating mixed customer experiences. A notable concern emerged from reviews stating instances of cash unavailability despite customer visits. As a payday lender, the company operates within Nevada's regulatory framework but offers high-cost short-term debt products that carry significant financial risks. Customers should carefully evaluate whether emergency payday borrowing aligns with their financial situation, as these loans typically involve high interest rates and fees.
address: 550 N Eastern Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89101

company_info.headquarters: 550 N Eastern Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89101

pros: Extended hours including weekends (9AM-7PM most days, 10AM-5PM Sunday) for working customers
Multiple loan access methods: online applications and in-person visits at physical location
Quick funding claims with simple online form process
Loan amounts up to $2,500 available for larger emergency needs
Five-year customer retention mentioned in testimonials indicating some customer loyalty
Physical storefront location allows immediate cash disbursement without waiting for transfers
Flexible loan increments from $100 to $2,500 to match various emergency amounts
cons: Low overall rating of 3.4 stars with reported instances of cash unavailability at the location
Payday loan products carry high interest rates and fees typical of the industry, creating debt cycles
Limited number of reviews (17 total) makes it difficult to assess overall reliability
No transparency on the website regarding specific APR rates, fees, or repayment terms
Negative customer feedback reporting being turned away due to insufficient cash inventory
best_for: Employed individuals facing unexpected expenses before their next paycheck
Las Vegas residents needing immediate cash with proof of income and valid ID
Customers preferring in-person transactions over purely online lenders
Short-term borrowers who can repay within weeks rather than months
diagnosis: Cashland Financial Services is best for Las Vegas residents with stable employment who need emergency cash quickly and prefer in-person lending. The main caveat is that payday loans carry high costs and create significant debt risk; this should only be used as a last resort for genuine emergencies when other options are unavailable.
services: Online loan applications with simple forms
In-person loan processing at physical location
Fast cash access for emergency expenses
Direct location visits for immediate disbursement
Flexible loan amount selection ($100-$1K standard, up to $2,500 available)
